edges.description: App uses AuthProvider and useAuth for authentication
App renders LoginScreen when not authenticated
App renders Layout for authenticated users
App imports and renders Dashboard page
App imports and renders MarketWatch page
App imports and renders Strategies page
App imports and renders Backtesting page
App imports and renders AIEngine page
App imports and renders RiskMonitor page
App imports and renders OrderManagement page
App imports and renders SystemHealth page
App imports and renders Settings page
App imports and renders BrokerDemo page
App imports and renders PaperPositions page
App imports and renders PaperHistory page
App imports and renders NewsCalendar page
App imports and renders TradeHistory page
Backtesting uses useComparisonBacktest hook for multi-provider comparison
DataFeedConfig uses OANDA service for configuration
Vite configured to build React app
HTML loads React app entry point
